name: Honey Wheat Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tablespoons vital gluten (optional, up to 3 tablespoons)
2 teaspoons active dry yeast (or 1 1/2 teaspoons if using SAF instant yeast)
recipeInstructions: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the baking surface for regular or whole wheat dough with a medium crust setting.
